results.title: 2025 review, 2026 preview - Rick Rule | Substack
excerpts:
# 2025 review, 2026 preview
## RIN #10
### Silver
A wave of silver M&A activity saw three of the best development stories acquired in 2024-2025, with buyers **Coeur Mining** , **First Majestic Silver** , and **Pan American Silver** demonstrating exquisite timing in their purchases. The focus now shifts onto the next crop of silver developers that may be the next M&A targets. These include **Abra Silver** , **Argenta Silver** , **Outcrop Gold and Silver** and **Aya Gold and Silver** , which all participated in the 2025 Rule Symposium, which we [previewed in RIN #4](https://realrickrule.substack.com/p/rule-symposium-company-preview?r=a38ft) . Here is Rick from our Silver Bull issue:
“When silver moves, it is a truly spectacular event. You have an asset class that can triple, and that increase can be magnified two or three times in the higher quality equities around that asset class. The rent you get paid is so extraordinary that the holding cost of maintaining a position in anticipation becomes negligible.”

# Rule Symposium — 2025
## Introducing a Star-Studded
### Robert Quartermain
#### Craig Perry
Craig has led teams and been involved in several exceptional discoveries and resource projects including Vizsla’s discovery of new veins at its Panuco-Copala silver district, IsoEnergy’s Hurricane uranium deposit, NexGen’s Arrow uranium deposit and Tigers Realm Coal’s Amaam and Amaam North coking coal deposits.
